{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Draconic Records
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Draconic Records]] describe the [[Archstone]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
